A results-driven Embedded Systems Engineer with hands-on expertise in bare-metal firmware, real-time operating systems, and IoT-connected solutions. 02   Work Experience

Internships

2025
Jul 7 – Jul 19
Artiwiz Technologies
Embedded Systems & IoT Intern · STM32 / FreeRTOS

Developed production-grade firmware for Intel 8051 and STM32F407VGT6 microcontrollers using Bare Metal coding, HAL Library, and FreeRTOS. Gained deep expertise in real-time task scheduling, peripheral driver development, and systematic debugging of embedded applications for resource-constrained environments.

2025
Jul 29 – Aug 29
CSIR – CSIO, Chennai
Research Intern · Under Dr. G. S. Ayyappan, Sr. Principal Scientist

Selected for a competitive national research internship at the Central Scientific Instruments Organisation, a premier CSIR laboratory. Received advanced training in electronics design, embedded systems, IoT applications, and hands-on exposure to state-of-the-art scientific instrumentation and R&D methodologies.

03   Featured Work

Projects

⭐ Best Project
Predictive Analytics and AI-Optimized Battery Management for Electric Vehicles

Engineered a cutting-edge AI-driven Battery Management System for electric vehicles using ESP32 integrated with electrical and thermal sensors. Applied machine learning models for real-time State of Charge (SoC) and State of Health (SoH) estimation, achieving industry-leading prediction accuracy. IoT-enabled cloud integration provides live monitoring dashboards and predictive failure alerts — significantly optimising energy efficiency and extending battery lifecycle in EV applications.

✅ SoC Accuracy: 99.96% ✅ Temperature Accuracy: 99.54% ✅ Voltage Accuracy: 99.92%
ESP32Machine LearningSOC/SOH EstimationIoTCloud DashboardPredictive Analytics
Project 02
IoT-Based Industrial Predictive Maintenance System

Designed a real-time industrial machinery health monitoring system using ESP32 with ADXL345 vibration and DS18B20 temperature sensors to detect anomalies early. Implemented MQTT protocol to stream telemetry data to a cloud dashboard, enabling predictive fault detection and significantly reducing unexpected equipment downtime.

ESP32MQTTADXL345DS18B20Cloud IoTPredictive Maintenance
